title: pinalia elata
intro: Pinalia elata, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Pinalia genus. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, Pinalia elata is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Pinalia elata is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts that are used to treat various health conditions, including diabetes and respiratory issues.
